title: Nami Tries to Push the Crew Away
scene: On pages 1–4, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. Nami tries to cut herself off from Luffy’s crew while Zoro and the others see that something is wrong.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What did you come to this island for?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What're you talking about?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Aren't we crewmates?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We've come for you, of course!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well you're nothing but a nuisance.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: and "Crew- mates?"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't make me laugh.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It was nothing but a stupid little cooperation.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Nami! It's me! Do you remember me? Let's set sail together!:)

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Shut up! Can't you see you're making things more complicated by butting in!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What was that? Don't you know love is always a hurricane!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I told you so! She's a witch!

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: If it means she can get her hands on the treasure hidden in her village,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong Pirates
dialogue.text: She'll gladly join the Arlong Pirates and even kill!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: She's a cold- blooded witch through and through!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You've all been deceived right from the start!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And I swear I saw her stabbing usopp!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: ...so what?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Would you like to try and avenge him?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What...!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Let me tell you one thing. After the idiotic stunt that Zoro pulled, Arlong wants Roronoa Zoro and all his companions dead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: No matter how monstrously strong you may all be,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You're no match at all for the real monster.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I couldn't care less about that.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Where's usopp?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: at the bottom of the ocean.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's it, I've had enough of you!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And I've had enough of you!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Does a swordsman harm ladies as well, Roronoa zoro?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The hell did you say? Don't butt in when you don't know the first thing about anything!

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
